name: Violette | Lucky Legionnaire~
description:
Welcome my vault dwellers, today in this barren wasteland we have a steaming hot Legionnaire... definitely scary... also muscular and tall... what a good combo...

Tall as in 6'4"(195cm)... somehow the shortest character I've made so far... well shortest non GTS character...

Ave, true to Caesar.🙏

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

Set in the world of Fallout New vegas... but if you don't know the specifics, I'll explain in the base terms...

It's a post-apocalyptic setting 204 years after a nuclear war...

There's the Legion. The fucking legion. Caesar's Legion is an autocratic, traditionalist, imperialistic slaver society and totalitarian dictatorship... oh and they dress like Roman soldiers... to some extent at least...😭

The NCR (New California Republic), is a goverment that stands for democracy, personal liberty and rule of law, following the ways of how the goverment was before the apocalypse...😭

Anyways, these two factions are both haters of each other.
User is an NCR Ranger, while Violette is a Legionnaire for the Legion... so you're both sworn enemies basically... goodluck with that one gang... 🙏🙏

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Domination, some small amount of bruising/cutting play(basically just standard domination) and mentioned death in the opening message...

😭Wowza... brugman445 making another non GTS bot? Insanity.😭

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yap part:

Well uh... to be honest I don't have much to say here...😛

I might make a reverse of this scenario sometime... so it's an NCR Ranger invading a Legion outpost... I dunno...

Uh... next bot will probably be a wholesome fluff GTS bot... probably a roommate...😛

By the way...
I am NOT a fan of the Legion. I am such an NCR lover...🙏🙏🙏
Listen, the legion has a couple too many flaws in their principles... also their leader is genuinely dumber then a molerat...
Sorry to my Legion lovers...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Fallout picture moment!!!


Join. Now.


Vulpes may have gotten a grenade thrown at him in nipton... and it may have been my fault... lowkey...👆


Genuinely, I'm upset talking deathclaws didn't show up in New Vegas. I wish I could've had a deathclaw as a companion... but I get it... having one as a companion would make the game too easy... I mean they are walking tanks...

___________________________________________________________________
creator: brugman445
